name: autonomath-mcp
description: 日本の制度 (補助金 11,684 / 法令本文 154 + 法令メタデータ 9,484 / 判例 2,065 / 税制 50 / 適格事業者 13,801 / 採択事例 2,286 / 行政処分 1,185 / 入札 362 / 融資 108) を REST + MCP API (93 tools) で横断検索。一次資料 URL 付き、¥3/req metered (税込 ¥3.30) 完全従量、anon 3/日 per IP free。
long_description: Search Japanese institutional public data via REST + MCP API. Coverage: 11,684 searchable subsidies (補助金/融資/税制/認定; tier S=114 / A=1,340 / B=4,186 / C=6,044; full table 14,472 incl. 2,788 public-hold/quarantine rows) + 154 laws full-text indexed + 9,484 law catalog stubs (e-Gov, CC-BY; full-text load incremental) + 2,065 court decisions + 50 tax rulesets (インボイス/電帳法 + 研究開発 + IT導入会計処理) + 13,801 invoice registrants (国税庁適格事業者, PDL v1.0) + 2,286 adoption cases + 1,185 enforcement records + 108 loan products (担保 / 個人保証人 / 第三者保証人 三軸独立 enum) + 362 bids + 181 exclusion/prerequisite rules. 93 MCP tools at default gates (39 core + 50 autonomath, including industry packs pack_construction / pack_manufacturing / pack_real_estate). MCP protocol 2025-06-18. Records carry primary-source URL + fetched_at on 99%+ of rows; aggregator sources are excluded. Pricing: ¥3/req tax-exclusive (¥3.30 tax-inclusive, Stripe metered); anonymous tier 3 req/day per IP free (no signup, JST next-day reset). Not legal/tax/行政書士 advice; verify primary sources before any business decision. Operator: Bookyou株式会社 (インボイス登録番号 T8010001213708, info@bookyou.net).

tools.name: search_programs
tools.description: Search 11,684 searchable Japanese public programs of 14,472 total (national + prefectural subsidies, loans, tax incentives, certifications) with tier / prefecture / funding_purpose / amount filters. Tier S=114 / A=1,340 / B=4,186 / C=6,044 searchable; 2,788 public-hold/quarantine rows excluded, excluded by default. Typical args: prefecture='東京都' (47 都道府県), target_industry JSIC 1-letter (D=建設, E=製造, K=不動産…), funding_purpose ('equipment'/'it_introduction'/'gx'/'business_restructuring'). 99%+ of rows carry primary-source URL + fetched_at.

tools.name: get_program
tools.description: Full enriched program detail by unified_id — A–J dimensions, source_mentions, lineage, related programs.

tools.name: batch_get_programs
tools.description: Batch fetch up to 50 programs by unified_id in one round-trip. Use after search_programs to hydrate selected results.

tools.name: check_exclusions
tools.description: Given a candidate set of program IDs, run all 181 exclusion / prerequisite rules and return only the violations — answers "can I combine A and B?" in one call.

tools.name: list_exclusion_rules
tools.description: Enumerate all 181 exclusion + prerequisite rules (125 exclude + 17 prerequisite + 15 absolute + 24 other) with source_url evidence. Browse the catalog; use check_exclusions to test specific combinations.

tools.name: search_case_studies
tools.description: Search 2,286 採択事例 (real acceptance records, 事業再構築 + ものづくり + IT導入 etc.). Filter by prefecture / industry / program / amount.

tools.name: get_case_study
tools.description: Full 採択事例 detail including applicant attributes, project scope, awarded amount, primary source.

tools.name: search_loan_programs
tools.description: Search 108 融資プログラム (日本政策金融公庫 / 自治体融資 / 信金) with three-axis risk filters — 担保 / 個人保証人 / 第三者保証人 are separate enum axes for exact "無担保・無保証人" queries.

tools.name: get_loan_program
tools.description: Full 融資 detail including 3-axis guarantor decomposition, interest rate, repayment terms, target entities, primary source.

tools.name: search_enforcement_cases
tools.description: Search 1,185 行政処分 cases (指名停止 / 建設業処分 / 宅建業処分 等) to vet contractors / applicants / vendors by entity name, authority, or period.

tools.name: get_enforcement_case
tools.description: Full 行政処分 detail — entity, violation type, authority, duration, effective/expiry dates, source.

tools.name: get_meta
tools.description: Dataset meta — total row counts, tier distribution, prefecture distribution, exclusion rule count, last-ingest timestamp, version.

tools.name: enum_values
tools.description: Probe the live canonical vocabulary for filter fields (target_type / funding_purpose / program_kind / authority_level / prefecture / event_type / ministry / loan_type / provider / programs_used). Returns top-N by frequency so callers pick real values instead of hallucinating strings that silently return 0 rows.

tools.name: prescreen_programs
tools.description: Ranked pre-screening from caller profile (prefecture / sole_proprietor / planned investment / declared certifications). Fuses search_programs + check_exclusions + amount-fit in one call. Returns fit_score, match_reasons, and caveats (insufficient amount, missing prerequisite, etc.) per row — rows aren't hidden, issues are surfaced.

tools.name: upcoming_deadlines
tools.description: Calendar of 補助金 / 助成金 deadlines closing within N days (default 30). Filters + sorts application_window.end_date server-side; days_remaining per row. Nationwide and prefecture-unassigned rows always pass a prefecture filter — solves "what's due for 東京 SMBs in 30 days" in one call.

tools.name: search_laws
tools.description: Search Japanese statutes (e-Gov法令, CC-BY) by name or article text. FTS5 trigram + statute kind / jurisdiction / enforcement-date filters. Primary-source URL + fetched_at on 99%+ of rows.

tools.name: get_law
tools.description: Full statute body (table of contents + all articles + supplementary provisions) by law_id.

tools.name: list_law_revisions
tools.description: Timeline of amendments for one statute (enforcement date, reason, diff links) — track how a program's underlying law has shifted.

tools.name: search_court_decisions
tools.description: Search Japanese court decisions (最高裁 / 高裁 / 地裁 / 簡裁) by case number, issue keyword, ruling date, or court level. Returns holdings + referenced statutes with primary-source URLs.

tools.name: get_court_decision
tools.description: Full decision detail (parties, facts, issues, holding, disposition, cited statutes, lower-court history) by decision_id.

tools.name: find_precedents_by_statute
tools.description: Given a law_id + article number, return court decisions that directly cite that article — surfaces actual enforcement patterns and interpretive divergence.

tools.name: search_bids
tools.description: Search national + prefectural tenders (GEPS + 47 都道府県). Filter by issuing agency, category, estimated amount, procurement method. Notice URL + specification doc + publication date as lineage.

tools.name: get_bid
tools.description: Full tender detail (agency, category, spec doc, eligibility, procurement method, estimated/awarded price, result) by bid_id.

tools.name: bid_eligible_for_profile
tools.description: Ranked eligibility check for a bidder profile (rank, region, sector, track record). Insufficient rank / out-of-region / no prior awards are surfaced as caveats, not hidden.

tools.name: search_tax_rules
tools.description: Search qualified-invoice + electronic-records-retention rulesets. Filter by transaction scope, transition period, qualifying requirements, penalties. Lineage to 国税庁 notices / guidance / FAQ.

tools.name: get_tax_rule
tools.description: Full tax ruleset detail (requirements, transition rules, bookkeeping duties, exceptions, related Q&A) by rule_id.

tools.name: evaluate_tax_applicability
tools.description: Given a transaction profile (amount, registrant flag, date, document format), return invoice + e-records applicability and required actions via rules engine.

tools.name: search_invoice_registrants
tools.description: Search 国税庁 qualified invoice issuer registry (PDL v1.0, re-distributable with attribution). Filter by 法人番号, name, registration/cancellation date — counterparty registration verification and deregistration monitoring.

tools.name: trace_program_to_law
tools.description: Trace a subsidy / loan program's statutory basis (unified_id → law_id + article). Indexes program_law_refs so agents can attribute the grant ordinance to its underlying law with primary-source citations.

tools.name: find_cases_by_law
tools.description: Given law_id + article, return enforcement cases that directly cite that article — via enforcement_decision_refs, couples with search_enforcement_cases.

tools.name: combined_compliance_check
tools.description: Given a business profile + planned transactions, cross-evaluate applicable laws, precedent trends, tax requirements, and bid eligibility restrictions. Top-level cross-dataset glue: one call surfaces the full regulatory surface for a new venture.

tools.name: smb_starter_pack
tools.description: SMB onboarding pack from (prefecture + industry_jsic + employees): top 補助金 + loan options + exclusion conflicts + similar case studies + recent enforcement + 30/60/90-day deadlines in a single call. Collapses a 6-call discovery chain.

tools.name: subsidy_combo_finder
tools.description: Find non-conflicting subsidy + loan + tax combos for a profile (keyword / prefecture / industry_jsic). Auto-runs check_exclusions, filters distressed-loan keywords, returns ranked top-N combos in one call.

tools.name: deadline_calendar
tools.description: Upcoming deadlines grouped by month for N months ahead, filterable by prefecture. Unknown prefectures surface input_warnings instead of silently empty; 0-hit prefecture result hints at national fallback.

tools.name: dd_profile_am
tools.description: Due-diligence from houjin_bangou (T-prefix / hyphens / 全角 all normalized): entity + adoptions history + invoice registration + enforcement record in one call. Honesty gates on null adoption amounts + invoice mirror delta-only.

tools.name: similar_cases
tools.description: Case-study-led discovery: from a seed case_id (or free-text description) return up to 20 similar 採択事例 ranked by weighted Jaccard (industry×2 + prefecture×1 + programs_used overlap×3). Each hit's programs_used names are best-effort resolved into programs rows (unified_id / tier / official_url) and returned as supporting_programs — the inverse of search_case_studies.

tools.name: regulatory_prep_pack
tools.description: Industry (JSIC) + prefecture (+ optional company size) → bundles relevant 法令 / 認定制度 / 税務ruleset / recent enforcement into a single compliance starter pack. Replaces the 4-5 round trip (search_laws → programs(certification) → search_tax_rules → search_enforcement_cases). Empty / sparse sections surface honesty hints + nested error envelope.

tools.name: subsidy_roadmap_3yr
tools.description: Industry (JSIC) + prefecture + company_size + funding_purpose → 3-year (default 36-month) timeline of plausibly-applicable subsidy / loan / tax application windows, bucketed into JST fiscal-year quarters (Apr-Jun=Q1). Returns timeline + by_quarter_count + total_ceiling_yen. Past from_date clamps to today JST; cycle=annual past start projects forward; empty results return nested error envelope (code/message/hint).

tools.name: search_tax_incentives
tools.description: Search tax measures in the autonomath entity-fact DB (税額控除 / 特別償却 / 優遇税制). Indexes 503,930 entities + 6.12M facts via FTS5 trigram + unicode61.

tools.name: search_certifications
tools.description: Search certification programs in autonomath DB (経営力向上計画 / 先端設備等導入計画 / 事業継続力強化計画 等).

tools.name: list_open_programs
tools.description: List currently-open program rounds from am_application_round — deadline-aware answers for '今出せるやつ' queries.

tools.name: enum_values_am
tools.description: Probe canonical vocabulary for autonomath filter fields (authority / region / industry_jsic / record_kind / target_profile etc.). Pre-empts hallucinated filter values that return 0 rows.

tools.name: search_by_law
tools.description: Find autonomath entities/facts anchored to a specific statute in am_law (e.g., 中小企業等経営強化法第X条に紐づく制度).

tools.name: active_programs_at
tools.description: Return programs that were active on a given date — leverages am_amendment_snapshot for time-bound lookups.

tools.name: related_programs
tools.description: Graph-walk am_relation (23,805 edges, 15 relation types) to surface related programs / certifications / tax measures for a given entity.

tools.name: search_acceptance_stats_am
tools.description: Search acceptance / adoption statistics in autonomath DB — complement to the core search_case_studies with broader fact coverage.

tools.name: intent_of
tools.description: Extract the legislative / program intent facet from am_entity_facts — answers 'why does this program exist' with primary-source citations.

tools.name: reason_answer
tools.description: Semantic QA over autonomath facts with tiered vector indexes (am_entities_vec). Skeleton — full embedding pipeline deferred to v0.3.x.

tools.name: get_am_tax_rule
tools.description: Full detail of a single am_tax_rule row (scope, rate, period, requirements, primary source) by rule id.

tools.name: search_gx_programs_am
tools.description: Search GX (green transformation) programs in autonomath DB — deeper coverage than core search_programs for 脱炭素 / 省エネ / 再エネ facets.

tools.name: search_loans_am
tools.description: Search loan products in am_loan_product (日本政策金融公庫 + 自治体 + 民間) with rate / term / collateral / guarantor filters. Complements core search_loan_programs.

tools.name: check_enforcement_am
tools.description: Check enforcement / disqualification detail in am_enforcement_detail — vendor / applicant vetting beyond core search_enforcement_cases.

tools.name: search_mutual_plans_am
tools.description: Search mutual insurance / 共済 plans in am_insurance_mutual (中小企業倒産防止共済 / 小規模企業共済 等).

tools.name: get_law_article_am
tools.description: Get a specific law article from am_law by statute id + article number — complement to core get_law for autonomath-side coverage.

tools.name: list_tax_sunset_alerts
tools.description: List tax incentives whose effective_until expires within N days (default 365). Tax-cliff alerting for 大綱-driven sunsets (年度末 3/31 / 年末 12/31) — answers '来年度どの優遇が消えるか' in one call.

tools.name: get_annotations
tools.description: V4 universal: list annotations attached to an autonomath entity (examiner_feedback / curator_note / amendment / qa kinds). 16,474 annotation rows from program-resolved examiner feedback (8,189 source rows). Surfaces program-level review notes that don't live in the structured fields.

tools.name: validate
tools.description: V4 universal: run all applicable validation rules (6 generic predicates registered: required_field / format / enum / range / cross_reference / freshness) against an entity / fact / applicant_data payload. Caches results in am_validation_result keyed by canonical applicant hash. Returns per-rule pass/fail + explanation.

tools.name: get_provenance
tools.description: V4 universal: full provenance ledger for an autonomath entity — every am_source row that contributed (license, fetched_at, source_url, role) plus license rollup (pdl_v1.0 / cc_by_4.0 / gov_standard / public_domain / proprietary counts). 97,272/97,272 sources have license filled.

tools.name: get_provenance_for_fact
tools.description: V4 universal: provenance for a single am_entity_facts row by fact_id — which source supplied this specific (entity_id, field_name, value) tuple, with license and fetched_at.

tools.name: list_static_resources_am
tools.description: Phase A: list static taxonomies bundled with autonomath (8 static taxonomies in data/autonomath_static/: prefecture / industry_jsic / target_profile / authority_level / record_kind / relation_type / event_type / funding_purpose). Pre-empts 0-hit queries from hallucinated enum values.

tools.name: get_static_resource_am
tools.description: Phase A: fetch a single static taxonomy by name (e.g., 'prefecture' returns the canonical 47 都道府県 list with codes and aliases). Read-only, no DB hit.

tools.name: list_example_profiles_am
tools.description: Phase A: list 5 canonical example applicant profiles (sole_proprietor_agri / smb_manufacturing_kanto / startup_it_tokyo / certified_keiei_kyouka / construction_kansai). Useful as ready-to-use payloads for prescreen / starter-pack tools and for AI-agent few-shot grounding.

tools.name: get_example_profile_am
tools.description: Phase A: fetch a single example profile by id. Returns the full applicant_data dict (prefecture / industry_jsic / employees / sole_proprietor / declared_certifications / planned_investment_yen) ready for prescreen_programs / smb_starter_pack input.

tools.name: deep_health_am
tools.description: Phase A: deep health probe for autonomath subsystem — DB connectivity, am_entities row count, FTS index status, vec index status, jpi_pc_program_health row count, last precompute refresh timestamp. Mounted on health_router (no AnonIpLimitDep), separate from /healthz.

tools.name: get_usage_status
tools.description: META: 現在のクォータ残量を確認する (probe current API quota state without consuming a slot).

tools.name: graph_traverse
tools.description: [KG] O7 — heterogeneous 1-3 hop knowledge-graph traversal over am_relation. 5-7 tool calls collapsed into 1 SQL walk; pure traversal (no Anthropic API).

tools.name: unified_lifecycle_calendar
tools.description: [O4-LIFECYCLE-CALENDAR] tax sunset + program sunset + application close + law cliff を月別/半期別 1 コール merge。

tools.name: program_lifecycle
tools.description: [O4-LIFECYCLE] 制度ライフサイクル 8 段階判定 — abolished / superseded / sunset_imminent / sunset_scheduled / amended / active / not_yet / unknown を 1 コールで決定論的に返す。

tools.name: program_abstract_structured
tools.description: [I18N] R7 — return audience-targeted, closed-vocab Japanese abstract for a single program. Translation is the customer LLM's job; we never call Anthropic API. official_name_ja + legal_id must stay verbatim (i18n_hints.official_name_must_keep_ja=true).

tools.name: prerequisite_chain
tools.description: [R5-PREREQUISITE-CHAIN] 前提認定 chain — 対象 program に必要な認定/計画/登録 + 取得時間 + 費用を 1 コール。

tools.name: rule_engine_check
tools.description: [R9-UNIFIED-RULE-ENGINE] One-tool rule evaluation across 6 corpora: exclusion (181 hand-curated rules) + compat_matrix (約4,300 sourced pairs + 約44,500 heuristic-inferred pairs marked status='unknown') + combo + subsidy + tax + validation.

tools.name: query_at_snapshot
tools.description: [AUDIT] R8 — pin programs query to historical dataset state. Returns rows + 3-axis audit trail (source_url + fetched_at + valid_from) for 法廷証拠 reproducibility.

resources.name: Data Model
resources.description: Canonical DB schema overview (tables, columns, relationships).

resources.name: record_kind enum
resources.description: Discriminator values for am_entities.record_kind.

resources.name: Response envelope schema (v2)
resources.description: Canonical JSON envelope shape every tool returns.

resources.name: Tool manifest (summary)
resources.description: Quick reference for the 50 autonomath tools.

resources.name: Primary-Source Policy
resources.description: Rule that every fact must trace to a government primary source.

resources.name: No-Hallucination Policy
resources.description: Hard rules the client LLM must follow when speaking on top of AutonoMath data.

resources.name: Terms of Service excerpt
resources.description: Key ToS clauses relevant to client LLM operators.

resources.name: Authority canonical list
resources.description: All authority_canonical values in the DB, refreshed daily.

resources.name: 47 Prefectures
resources.description: JIS X 0401 two-digit prefecture codes and names.

resources.name: program_kind enum
resources.description: Sub-type vocabulary for record_kind=program.

resources.name: Intent types (i01-i10)
resources.description: The 10 pre-mapped query intents.

resources.name: Graph edge types
resources.description: The 11 edge types in am_relation.

resources.name: Certification kinds
resources.description: Observed distribution of certification sub-kinds.

resources.name: Target profile vocabulary
resources.description: Observed target_types values (drifting vocabulary; use ALIAS).

resources.name: Freshness snapshot
resources.description: Row counts and last updated_at across record_kind.

resources.name: Taxonomy: seido
resources.description: 制度 master taxonomy (補助金/助成金/融資/税制/認定制度 codes + parent groupings).

resources.name: Taxonomy: glossary
resources.description: 用語 glossary — Japanese subsidy/loan/tax terminology with canonical labels.

resources.name: Taxonomy: money_types
resources.description: 助成区分 enum — 補助金/助成金/交付金/融資/保証/税制 etc. with sub-types.

resources.name: Taxonomy: obligations
resources.description: Post-award 義務 catalog (報告/取得財産管理/返還事由 etc.) keyed by 制度 code.

resources.name: Taxonomy: dealbreakers
resources.description: Dealbreaker rules — disqualifying conditions per 制度 (税滞納/暴排/倒産 etc.).

resources.name: Taxonomy: sector_combos
resources.description: Sector-combination matrix — which 制度 combine cleanly across industry/size axes.

resources.name: Taxonomy: crop_library (agri)
resources.description: 農業 crop library — JAS 品目コード + 標準収量 + 標準作期 + 補助金マッピング.

resources.name: Taxonomy: exclusion_rules (agri)
resources.description: 農業 exclusion rules — 制度間の併給制限/重複申請禁止/排他条件.

resources.name: Example profile: ichigo_20a
resources.description: Type A: 新規就農個人 — いちご 20a 施設栽培 (埼玉). Reference shape for 個人事業主 intake.

resources.name: Example profile: rice_200a
resources.description: Type D: 集落営農 — 水稲 200a + 大豆輪作 (新潟). Reference shape for 大規模法人 intake.

resources.name: Example profile: new_corp
resources.description: Type C: 法人参入 — 設立 5 年以内 / 施設トマト 40a (千葉). Reference shape for 新設法人 intake.

resources.name: Example profile: dairy_100head
resources.description: Type B: 既存農家 — フリーストール 100 頭酪農拡張 (北海道). Reference shape for 既存事業者 intake.

resources.name: Example profile: minimal
resources.description: Minimal viable baseline — required-only fields. Use for null/edge-case testing.

resources_gated.name: 36協定 template (時間外労働・休日労働協定届)
resources_gated.description: 36協定 (労基法 §36) draft template. Gated behind AUTONOMATH_36_KYOTEI_ENABLED.
